game_name: Last Battle: Legend of the Final Hero

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns six attack variations across standing, jumping, and crouching states
Meter fills gradually through enemy defeats; triggers super-powered state with rapid attacks when threshold reached
Primary level type: walk left-to-right while defeating all enemies in path
Gradual health drain instead of instant failure; creates resource pressure but not lethal barrier
Encountered throughout game; increase offensive or defensive strength, replenish health
Non-linear pathfinding required; must avoid traps and find correct route to goal
Single opponent with distinct fighting style; no time limit during boss battles
Displays current location and available paths; some levels must be completed in specific order

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate pressure cycle with time limit as consistent low-level tension; intensity spikes at boss encounters; maze sections break linear rhythm with exploration tension

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic combat (standing/jumping/crouching attacks) with linear progression; time limit pressure establishes early
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Maze dungeon navigation introduces complexity; additional boss encounters with distinct fight patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: Later chapter bosses (Dare-Devil, Cynara, Rob, Gromm, Grozz, Garokk) require mastery of all combat mechanics and power-up system management
notable_spikes: Final chapter bosses (three rebel generals scheme revenge)

notable_level_patterns.description: Standard level type: player walks left-to-right, encounters enemy groups sequentially, time limit creates health drain pressure
Non-linear pathfinding requirement; player must discover correct route to goal while avoiding traps; no time limit
One-on-one encounter with distinct antagonist; no time limit; requires learning attack patterns; no allied NPCs
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage finale encounters (Duke, Sophia, Dare-Devil, Cynara, Rob, Gromm, Grozz, Garokk)

notable_level_patterns.description: After completing level, player shown map displaying location and available paths; some levels must be done in specific order to progress chapter
